revision.text: '''Meiji''' refers to: * [[Emperor Meiji of Japan]], who reigned during the period below * the [[Meiji Era]], the period when the above emperor reigned
See: * [[Meiji Era]] - the period in [[Japan]]ese history when the Meiji Emperor reigned * '''Mutsuhito''', the '''Meiji Emperor''', who reigned during Meiji Era (see [[Emperor Meiji of Japan]])

revision.text:
'''Meiji''', the [[Romanization of Japanese|romanization]] of the [[Japanese language|Japanese]] [[Japanese writing system|symbols]] [[wiktionary:明|明]] {{smaller|("bright, brilliant, enlightened")}} [[wiktionary:治|治]] {{smaller|("reign, government")}}, may refer to:
===Japanese emperor and era=== * [[Emperor Meiji]], the Emperor of Japan between 1867 and 1912. ** [[Meiji period]], the name given to that period in Japanese history. *** [[Meiji Restoration]], the revolution that began the Meiji period. *** [[Meiji Constitution]], the constitution of the Empire of Japan between 1890 and 1947. ** [[Meiji Shrine]], the Shinto shrine dedicated to Emperor Meiji and his wife.
===Other uses=== <!--Alphabetical:--> * [[Meiji Dairies]], a major Japanese dairy company. * [[Meiji Mura]], an open-air architectural museum near Nagoya, Japan. * [[Meiji Seamount]], a seamount (underwater mountain) in the northern Pacific Ocean. * [[Meiji Seika]], a major Japanese confectionery firm. * Meiji Senmon Gakkou, the former name of the [[Kyushu Institute of Technology]]. * [[Meiji University]], a university in Tokyo. * [[Meiji Yasuda Life Insurance Company]], a major Japanese life insurance company.
{{disambig}}

{{wiktionary|Meiji|meiji}} '''Meiji''', the romanization of the Japanese characters [[wiktionary:明|明]] {{smaller|("bright, brilliant, enlightened")}} [[wiktionary:治|治]] {{smaller|("reign, government")}}, may refer to:
==Japanese emperor and era== * [[Emperor Meiji]], Emperor of Japan between 1867 and 1912 ** [[Meiji period]], the name given to that period in Japanese history *** [[Meiji Restoration]], the revolution that began the Meiji period *** [[Meiji Constitution]], the constitution of the Empire of Japan between 1890 and 1947 ** [[Meiji Shrine]], a Shinto shrine dedicated to Emperor Meiji and his wife
==Other uses== <!--Alphabetical:--> * [[Meiji Dairies]], a major Japanese dairy company * [[Meiji Mura]], an open-air architectural museum near Nagoya, Japan * [[Meiji Seamount]], a seamount (underwater mountain) in the northern Pacific Ocean * [[Meiji Seika]], a major Japanese confectionery firm * Meiji Senmon Gakkou, the former name of the [[Kyushu Institute of Technology]] * [[Meiji University]], a university in Tokyo * [[Meiji Yasuda Life Insurance Company]], a major Japanese life insurance company
==See also== * [[Meijer]], a grocery chain store in the American Midwest * Měijì, Hanyu Pinyin for the Chinese name of [[Mischief Reef]] (美济礁) * [[Meij (disambiguation)]]
{{disambiguation}}

==Japanese history== * [[Emperor Meiji]], Emperor of Japan between 1867 and 1912 ** [[Meiji era]], the name given to that period in Japanese history *** [[Meiji Restoration]], the revolution that began the Meiji period *** [[Meiji Constitution]], the constitution of the Empire of Japan between 1890 and 1947 ** [[Meiji Shrine]], a Shinto shrine dedicated to Emperor Meiji and his wife
==Other uses== <!--Alphabetical:--> * [[Meiji Holdings]], a Japanese food and pharmaceutical holding company ** [[Meiji (company)]], a Japanese food company ** [[Meiji Seika Pharma]], a Japanese pharmaceutical company * [[Meiji-mura]], an open-air architectural museum near Nagoya, Japan * [[Meiji Seamount]], a seamount (underwater mountain) in the northern Pacific Ocean * Meiji Senmon Gakkou, the former name of the [[Kyushu Institute of Technology]] * [[Meiji University]], a university in Tokyo, Japan * [[Meiji Yasuda Life]], a Japanese life insurance company
==See also== * [[Meijer]], a grocery chain store in the American Midwest * Měijì, Hanyu Pinyin for the Chinese name of [[Mischief Reef]] (美济礁) * [[Meij (disambiguation)]] * [[Meji]], Indian ceremonial bonfire
{{disambiguation}}

{{wiktionary|Meiji|meiji}} '''Meiji''', the romanization of the Japanese characters 明治, may refer to:
==Japanese history== * [[Emperor Meiji]], Emperor of Japan between 1867 and 1912 ** [[Meiji era]], the name given to that period in Japanese history *** [[Meiji Restoration]], the revolution that began the Meiji period *** [[Meiji Constitution]], the constitution of the Empire of Japan between 1890 and 1947 ** [[Meiji Shrines]][[Category:shrine disambiguations]], a Shinto shrine dedicated to Emperor Meiji and his wife
==Other uses== <!--Alphabetical:--> * [[Meiji Holdings]], a Japanese food and pharmaceutical holding company ** [[Meiji (company)]], a Japanese food company ** [[Meiji Seika Pharma]], a Japanese pharmaceutical company * [[Meiji-mura]], an open-air architectural museum near Nagoya, Japan * [[Meiji Seamount]], a seamount (underwater mountain) in the northern Pacific Ocean * Meiji Senmon Gakkou, the former name of the [[Kyushu Institute of Technology]] * [[Meiji University]], a university in Tokyo, Japan * [[Meiji Yasuda Life]], a Japanese life insurance company
==See also== * [[Meijer]], a grocery chain store in the American Midwest * Měijì, Hanyu Pinyin for the Chinese name of [[Mischief Reef]] (美济礁) * [[Meij (disambiguation)]] * [[Meji]], Indian ceremonial bonfire
{{disambiguation}}

==Other uses== <!--Alphabetical:--> * [[Meiji Holdings]], a Japanese food and pharmaceutical holding company ** [[Meiji (company)]], a Japanese food company ** [[Meiji Seika Pharma]], a Japanese pharmaceutical company * [[Meiji-mura]], an open-air architectural museum near Nagoya, Japan * [[Meiji Seamount]], a seamount (underwater mountain) in the northern Pacific Ocean * Meiji Senmon Gakkou, the former name of the [[Kyushu Institute of Technology]] * [[Meiji University]], a university in Tokyo, Japan * [[Meiji Yasuda Life]], a Japanese life insurance company

, a Shinto shrine dedicated to Emperor Meiji and his wife
==Other uses== <!--Alphabetical:--> * [[Meiji Holdings]], a Japanese food and pharmaceutical holding company ** [[Meiji (company)]], a Japanese food company ** [[Meiji Seika Pharma]], a Japanese pharmaceutical company * [[Meiji-mura]], an open-air architectural museum near Nagoya, Japan * [[Meiji Seamount]], a seamount (underwater mountain) in the northern Pacific Ocean * Meiji Senmon Gakkou, the former name of the [[Kyushu Institute of Technology]] * [[Meiji University]], a university in Tokyo, Japan * [[Meiji Yasuda Life]], a Japanese life insurance company
==See also== * [[Meijer]], a grocery chain store in the American Midwest * Měijì, Hanyu Pinyin for the Chinese name of [[Mischief Reef]] (美济礁) * [[Meij (disambiguation)]] * [[Meji]], Indian ceremonial bonfire
{{disambiguation}} <!--Meiji--> <!--Meiji-->

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{wiktionary|Meiji|meiji}} '''Meiji''', the romanization of the Japanese characters 明治, may refer to:
==Japanese history== * [[:en:Emperor Meiji|Emperor Meiji]], Emperor of Japan between 1867 and 1912 ** [[Meiji era]], the name given to that period in Japanese history *** [[Meiji Restoration]], the revolution that began the Meiji period *** [[Meiji Constitution]], the constitution of the Empire of Japan between 1890 and 1947 ** [[Meiji Shrines]]
, a Shinto shrine dedicated to Emperor Meiji and his wife
==Other uses==
* [[Meiji Holdings]], a Japanese food and pharmaceutical holding company ** [[:en:Meiji (company)|Meiji (company)]], a Japanese food company ** [[Meiji Seika Pharma]], a Japanese pharmaceutical company * [[:en:Meiji-mura|Meiji-mura]], an open-air architectural museum near Nagoya, Japan * [[Meiji Seamount]], a seamount (underwater mountain) in the northern Pacific Ocean * Meiji Senmon Gakkou, the former name of the [[:en:Kyushu Institute of Technology|Kyushu Institute of Technology]] * [[Meiji University]], a university in Tokyo, Japan * [[Meiji Yasuda Life]], a Japanese life insurance company
==See also== * [[:en:Meijer|Meijer]], a grocery chain store in the American Midwest * Měijì, Hanyu Pinyin for the Chinese name of [[Mischief Reef]] (美济礁) * [[:en:Meij (disambiguation)|Meij (disambiguation)]] * [[Meji]], Indian ceremonial bonfire
{{disambiguation}}
{{draft categories| [[Category:Shrine disambiguations]]
[[Category:All disambiguation pages]] }}

==Japanese history== * [[:en:Emperor Meiji|Emperor Meiji]], Emperor of Japan between 1867 and 1912 ** [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]], the name given to that period in Japanese history *** [[Meiji Restoration]], the revolution that began the Meiji period *** [[:en:Meiji Constitution|Meiji Constitution]], the constitution of the Empire of Japan between 1890 and 1947 ** [[Meiji Shrines]]
, a Shinto shrine dedicated to Emperor Meiji and his wife

* [[:en:Meiji Holdings|Meiji Holdings]], a Japanese food and pharmaceutical holding company ** [[:en:Meiji (company)|Meiji (company)]], a Japanese food company ** [[:en:Meiji Seika Pharma|Meiji Seika Pharma]], a Japanese pharmaceutical company * [[:en:Meiji-mura|Meiji-mura]], an open-air architectural museum near Nagoya, Japan * [[:en:Meiji Seamount|Meiji Seamount]], a seamount (underwater mountain) in the northern Pacific Ocean * Meiji Senmon Gakkou, the former name of the [[:en:Kyushu Institute of Technology|Kyushu Institute of Technology]] * [[:en:Meiji University|Meiji University]], a university in Tokyo, Japan * [[:en:Meiji Yasuda Life|Meiji Yasuda Life]], a Japanese life insurance company

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ar:ميجي (توضيح)]][[bg:Мейджи (пояснение)]][[ca:Meiji]][[de:Meiji (Begriffsklärung)]][[en:Meiji]][[es:Meiji]][[et:Meiji]][[eu:Meiji (argipena)]][[fa:میجی (ابهام‌زدایی)]][[fi:Meiji]][[fr:Meiji]][[he:מייג'י]][[hr:Meiji]][[id:Meiji (disambiguasi)]][[it:Meiji (disambigua)]][[ja:明治 (曖昧さ回避)]][[ko:메이지]][[la:Meiji (discretiva)]][[lt:Meidži]][[nl:Meiji]][[no:Meiji]][[pl:Meiji]][[pt:Meiji]][[sk:Meidži]][[th:เมจิ]][[tl:Meiji]][[tr:Meiji]][[vi:Meiji (định hướng)]][[zh-classical:明治 (釋義)]][[zh-yue:明治 (搞清楚)]][[zh:明治 (消歧義)]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q224959]] Wikidata name: Meiji [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:08, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{wiktionary|Meiji|meiji}} '''Meiji''', the romanization of the Japanese characters 明治, may refer to:
==Japanese history== * [[:en:Emperor Meiji|Emperor Meiji]], Emperor of Japan between 1867 and 1912 ** [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]], the name given to that period in Japanese history *** [[Meiji Restoration]], the revolution that began the Meiji period *** [[:en:Meiji Constitution|Meiji Constitution]], the constitution of the Empire of Japan between 1890 and 1947 ** [[Meiji Shrines]]
, a Shinto shrine dedicated to Emperor Meiji and his wife
==Other uses==
* [[:en:Meiji Holdings|Meiji Holdings]], a Japanese food and pharmaceutical holding company ** [[:en:Meiji (company)|Meiji (company)]], a Japanese food company ** [[:en:Meiji Seika Pharma|Meiji Seika Pharma]], a Japanese pharmaceutical company * [[:en:Meiji-mura|Meiji-mura]], an open-air architectural museum near Nagoya, Japan * [[:en:Meiji Seamount|Meiji Seamount]], a seamount (underwater mountain) in the northern Pacific Ocean * Meiji Senmon Gakkou, the former name of the [[:en:Kyushu Institute of Technology|Kyushu Institute of Technology]] * [[:en:Meiji University|Meiji University]], a university in Tokyo, Japan * [[:en:Meiji Yasuda Life|Meiji Yasuda Life]], a Japanese life insurance company
==See also== * [[:en:Meijer|Meijer]], a grocery chain store in the American Midwest * Měijì, Hanyu Pinyin for the Chinese name of [[:en:Mischief Reef|Mischief Reef]] (美济礁) * [[:en:Meij (disambiguation)|Meij (disambiguation)]] * [[:en:Meji|Meji]], Indian ceremonial bonfire

==Japanese history== * [[:en:Emperor Meiji|Emperor Meiji]], Emperor of Japan between 1867 and 1912 ** [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]], the name given to that period in Japanese history *** [[Meiji Restoration]], the revolution that began the Meiji period *** [[:en:Meiji Constitution|Meiji Constitution]], the constitution of the Empire of Japan between 1890 and 1947 ** [[Meiji Shrines]]
, a Shinto shrine dedicated to Emperor Meiji and his wife
==Other uses==
* [[:en:Meiji Holdings|Meiji Holdings]], a Japanese food and pharmaceutical holding company ** [[:en:Meiji (company)|Meiji (company)]], a Japanese food company ** [[:en:Meiji Seika Pharma|Meiji Seika Pharma]], a Japanese pharmaceutical company * [[:en:Meiji-mura|Meiji-mura]], an open-air architectural museum near Nagoya, Japan * [[:en:Meiji Seamount|Meiji Seamount]], a seamount (underwater mountain) in the northern Pacific Ocean * Meiji Senmon Gakkou, the former name of the [[:en:Kyushu Institute of Technology|Kyushu Institute of Technology]] * [[:en:Meiji University|Meiji University]], a university in Tokyo, Japan * [[:en:Meiji Yasuda Life|Meiji Yasuda Life]], a Japanese life insurance company
==See also== * [[:en:Meijer|Meijer]], a grocery chain store in the American Midwest * Měijì, Hanyu Pinyin for the Chinese name of [[:en:Mischief Reef|Mischief Reef]] (美济礁) * [[:en:Meij (disambiguation)|Meij (disambiguation)]] * [[:en:Meji|Meji]], Indian ceremonial bonfire

==Japanese history== * [[:en:Emperor Meiji|Emperor Meiji]], Emperor of Japan between 1867 and 1912 ** [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]], the name given to that period in Japanese history *** [[Meiji Restoration]], the revolution that began the Meiji period *** [[:en:Meiji Constitution|Meiji Constitution]], the constitution of the Empire of Japan between 1890 and 1947 ** [[Meiji Shrines]]
, a Shinto shrine dedicated to Emperor Meiji and his wife
==Other uses==
* [[:en:Meiji Holdings|Meiji Holdings]], a Japanese food and pharmaceutical holding company ** [[:en:Meiji (company)|Meiji (company)]], a Japanese food company ** [[:en:Meiji Seika Pharma|Meiji Seika Pharma]], a Japanese pharmaceutical company * [[:en:Meiji-mura|Meiji-mura]], an open-air architectural museum near Nagoya, Japan * [[:en:Meiji Seamount|Meiji Seamount]], a seamount (underwater mountain) in the northern Pacific Ocean * Meiji Senmon Gakkou, the former name of the [[:en:Kyushu Institute of Technology|Kyushu Institute of Technology]] * [[:en:Meiji University|Meiji University]], a university in Tokyo, Japan * [[:en:Meiji Yasuda Life|Meiji Yasuda Life]], a Japanese life insurance company
==See also== * [[:en:Meijer|Meijer]], a grocery chain store in the American Midwest * Měijì, Hanyu Pinyin for the Chinese name of [[:en:Mischief Reef|Mischief Reef]] (美济礁) * [[:en:Meij (disambiguation)|Meij (disambiguation)]] * [[:en:Meji|Meji]], Indian ceremonial bonfire
{{disambiguation}}

==Japanese history== * {{ill|Emperor Meiji|en|Emperor Meiji|WD=Q174231|lt=Emperor Meiji}}, Emperor of Japan between 1867 and 1912 ** {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}}, the name given to that period in Japanese history *** [[Meiji Restoration]], the revolution that began the Meiji period *** {{ill|Meiji Constitution|en|Meiji Constitution|WD=Q122804|lt=Meiji Constitution}}, the constitution of the Empire of Japan between 1890 and 1947 ** [[Meiji Shrines]]
, a Shinto shrine dedicated to Emperor Meiji and his wife

{{wiktionary|Meiji|meiji}} '''Meiji''', the romanization of the Japanese characters 明治, may refer to:
==Japanese history== * {{ill|Emperor Meiji|en|Emperor Meiji|qid=Q174231|lt=Emperor Meiji|1=Emperor Meiji}}, Emperor of Japan between 1867 and 1912 ** {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}}, the name given to that period in Japanese history *** [[Meiji Restoration]], the revolution that began the Meiji period *** {{ill|Meiji Constitution|en|Meiji Constitution|qid=Q122804|lt=Meiji Constitution|1=Meiji Constitution}}, the constitution of the Empire of Japan between 1890 and 1947 ** [[Meiji Shrines]]
, a Shinto shrine dedicated to Emperor Meiji and his wife
==Other uses==
* {{ill|Meiji Holdings|en|Meiji Holdings|qid=Q11512295|lt=Meiji Holdings|1=Meiji Holdings}}, a Japanese food and pharmaceutical holding company ** [[:en:Meiji (company)|Meiji (company)]], a Japanese food company ** {{ill|Meiji Seika Pharma|en|Meiji Seika Pharma|qid=Q11232923|lt=Meiji Seika Pharma|1=Meiji Seika Pharma}}, a Japanese pharmaceutical company * {{ill|Meiji-mura|en|Meiji-mura|qid=Q985290|lt=Meiji-mura|1=Meiji-mura}}, an open-air architectural museum near Nagoya, Japan * {{ill|Meiji Seamount|en|Meiji Seamount|qid=Q3298600|lt=Meiji Seamount|1=Meiji Seamount}}, a seamount (underwater mountain) in the northern Pacific Ocean * Meiji Senmon Gakkou, the former name of the {{ill|Kyushu Institute of Technology|en|Kyushu Institute of Technology|qid=Q1150245|lt=Kyushu Institute of Technology|1=Kyushu Institute of Technology}} * {{ill|Meiji University|en|Meiji University|qid=Q46492|lt=Meiji University|1=Meiji University}}, a university in Tokyo, Japan * {{ill|Meiji Yasuda Life|en|Meiji Yasuda Life|qid=Q174081|lt=Meiji Yasuda Life|1=Meiji Yasuda Life}}, a Japanese life insurance company
==See also== * {{ill|Meijer|en|Meijer|qid=Q1917753|lt=Meijer|1=Meijer}}, a grocery chain store in the American Midwest * Měijì, Hanyu Pinyin for the Chinese name of {{ill|Mischief Reef|en|Mischief Reef|qid=Q1536891|lt=Mischief Reef|1=Mischief Reef}} (美济礁) * [[:en:Meij (disambiguation)|Meij (disambiguation)]] * [[:en:Meji|Meji]], Indian ceremonial bonfire
